0x0	addi s0,s0,1	00000000000101000000010000010011
0x4	sub t3,zero,s0	01000000100000000000111000110011
0x8	add s1,s0,s0	00000000100001000000010010110011
0xc	slt t0,s0,s1	00000000100101000010001010110011
0x10	slt t1,s1,s0	00000000100001001010001100110011
0x14	srl a2,t2,s0	00000000100000111101011000110011
0x18	srl a3,t2,t2	00000000011100111101011010110011
0x1c	beq zero,zero,0	00000000000000000000000001100011
